title: EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: IRCO AFRICA HOUSE EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance, rental deposit assistance, and rent application fee assistance along with housing case management services. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed and on a first come, first serve basis. Only the first 40 callers will receive callbacks. Rent assistance is limited to 2 months. 709 NE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: -Currently have an court dated eviction notice -Imminent risk of homelessness -Household income at or below 65% of Area Medium Income (AMI) Hours: No standard hours (503) 234-2048 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 234-2048 Hotline INTAKE PROCEDURE: When line is open, leave a message with first name, last name, and phone number. Unable to consider calls when hotline is not open. Calls are returned on a first-come, first-served basis. No walk-ins accepted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID for adults, Social Security cards, and proof of income for the past 30 days for all adults LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, Burmese, Dari, Farsi, Hindi, Hmong, Karen, Nepali, Pashto, Urdu, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Application Fee Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFRICAN LEADERSHIP DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IRCO AFRICA HOUSE
